summary: Both REQ-16 and REQ-17 appear to be implemented in the diff. PhotoUpload.tsx now uses two separate hidden file inputs with correct `accept` and `capture` attributes wired via refs to distinct buttons, addressing REQ-16. AssetEntryForm.tsx now awaits `geo.capture()` on submission and reads coordinates from the promise result rather than stale state, addressing REQ-17. The implementation looks complete based on the available diff, though portions are truncated.

hallucinated_features.description: A dedicated 'Capture GPS Location Now' button that lets users pre-capture and verify GPS before submission (manual GPS capture before form submit).
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requires GPS capture on form submission (REQ-17). The diff adds an extra handleCaptureGPS handler and isCapturingGPS state for a pre-submission manual GPS capture button, which was not requested.
